name: Precise X
official_rules_text: Each time a unit with the Precise X keyword spends an Aim token during the Reroll Attack Dice step, it can reroll up to X additional attack dice per Aim token spent.
description: Each time a unit with the Precise X keyword spends an Aim token during the Reroll Attack Dice step, it can reroll up to X additional attack dice per Aim token spent.
